props.name: variation
props.description: Selects the shape variation (0-3) used by the shader.

props.name: pixelRatioProp
props.description: Overrides the pixel ratio, typically set to the device pixel ratio.

props.name: shapeSize
props.description: Controls the size of the shape.

props.name: roundness
props.description: Determines the roundness of the shape's corners.

props.name: borderSize
props.description: Sets the thickness of the border.

props.name: circleSize
props.description: Determines the size of the hover circle effect.

props.name: circleEdge
props.description: Controls the edge softness of the hover circle.
